title: test: add youtube live chat network-disabled e2e
goal: Add network-disabled local E2E coverage and pre-network completion audit for YouTube Live Chat connector lifecycle.

risks.risk: Network-disabled E2E is mistaken for real network readiness.
risks.mitigation: Audit explicitly lists real-network prerequisites as incomplete and evidence keeps readiness claims false.

risks.risk: Global fetch or real network is accidentally used in local E2E.
risks.mitigation: Test replaces global fetch with throwing spy and asserts it is never called.

risks.risk: Sensitive auth material leaks through E2E output.
risks.mitigation: Test asserts no Authorization, Bearer, access token, refresh token, or client secret strings are present.
